title: rinorea andina
intro: Rinorea andina is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae, commonly known as the violet family, native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rinorea andina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Rinorea andina can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
